description_long: This is a medium-sized, floor-standing wooden bookcase with a rectangular top and four evenly spaced horizontal shelves, including the base. The front and back are open, allowing easy access to the shelves, while the sides feature a decorative slatted design with vertical and horizontal wooden bars. The wood has a light, natural finish with visible grain, giving it a slightly rustic appearance. The structure appears sturdy, with thick side panels and a solid top, suitable for holding books or decorative items. There are no visible doors, drawers, or additional compartments, and the shelves are empty.
description: A light wood, open-shelved bookcase with slatted sides and four shelves, featuring a rustic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the solid rectangular top, with the slatted side panels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the decorative slatted wooden design and the thickness of the side panels.
description_view_2: Back view, visually identical to the front, with open shelves and the same structural features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slatted wooden side and the bookcase's depth.
